'''Dbergo trees''' were jungle [[Plant/Legends|plants]] indigenous to [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]] known for their large red fronds. While speaking with [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Masters]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke]] and [[Mara Jade Skywalker]] before a meeting with nearly all [[New Jedi Order|Jedi]] on their way from the [[meditation pavilion]] to the [[lecture hall]] at the [[Jedi Academy (Ossus)|Jedi Academy]], [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] glanced at the crown of a dbergo tree while deciding how much information to reveal about a [[Force vision/Legends|Force vision]] he had had showing [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] [[Death/Legends|die]] after a devastating war with the [[Killik/Legends|Killiks]].<ref name="DN3SW" />

*''[[Dark Nest III: The Swarm War]]'' {{1st}}
